title: Pipe chart From/To follow inspection direction
description:
Pipe chart From/To now follow camera travel from WinCan inspection direction, not only the hydraulic SECTION From/To ends.

Downstream inspections always show From = Upstream MH → To = Downstream MH. Upstream inspections always show From = Downstream MH → To = Upstream MH (example: start at CB-5 going to CB-6).

Who is affected: PipeShare Pipe chart on BASE after deploy; SaaS after Push. Reload the inspection (or clear observation cache) once so DB3 re-parses with the new travel labels.
changeLog: Derive travel From/To from INS_InspectionDir plus Upstream/Downstream MH.
Upstream travel: From = Downstream MH, To = Upstream MH.
Downstream travel: From = Upstream MH, To = Downstream MH.
Sphere From/To roles match travel start/end on the shaft.
Bump inspection pipeline cache to v23 so old parses refresh.
